name: Bug Report

labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `office-cli ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Paste the JSON error response (`--json`) when applicable.

## Sample Document (if format-specific)

A minimal `.docx` / `.xlsx` / `.pptx` / `.pdf` file that reproduces the issue, or
clear instructions to construct one. Do not include sensitive data.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- CLI Version: (run `office-cli --version`)
- Install Method: (npm / binary / go install)

## Doctor Output

```
(paste the output of `office-cli doctor --json` here)
```

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
